div1.entryFree:
Awaken, the same as to awake; 1) trans.: Angelo, belike thinking me remiss in mine office, --s me with this unwonted putting on, Meas. IV, 2, 119. ay, mistress bride, hath that --ed you? Shr. V, 2, 42. I offered to a. his regard for's private friends, Cor. V, 1, 23.
2) intr.: some minute ere the time of her --ing, Rom. V, 3, 258 (only in Q2; other O. Edd. awaking).
